converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Owego and Ithaca Turnpike Company records
Owego and Ithaca Turnpike Company
2005
.2 cubic feet. .2 cubic feet.
1808-1936. Articles of agreement, correspondence, notes, account books, and stock certificates. Articles of agreement, correspondence, notes, account books, and stock certificates pertaining to the Owego and Ithaca Turnpike Company. Collection material in English 2086106
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
E. Engst
Date completed:
May 1984
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, April 2004
Date modified:
RMC Staff, date
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Articles of agreement, correspondence, notes, account books, and stock certificates pertaining to the Owego and Ithaca Turnpike Company.
Cite As:
Owego and Ithaca Turnpike Company records, #2005. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Account books. Transportation -- New York (State) Toll roads -- New York (State)
2086106 <<<<<<< HEAD Link to a partial finding aid that has the list of Stock Certificates.
Scope and Contents
Not all the material in the collection is covered by this guide.Articles of Agreement180811Notes and Articles of Agreement180912Notes and Articles of Agreement181013Notes and Agreements181114Notes, Agreements, Correspondence181315Notes, Articles of Agreement, Correspondence1821-183616Miscellaneous Lewis Beers Certificates1814-181517Memorandum - Account Book - Second Gate1810-181318Account Book - North Gate181119Account Book - Middle Gate1811-1817110Repair Book1813-1814111North Gate Book1814-1818112Turnpike Account Book1817-1818113Turnpike Account Book1817-1826114Stock Certificates (single & double)1809-1813115
